x-enumeration-literals.name: Account Holder
x-enumeration-literals.description: The person or entity whose financial status (balances, exposures, or obligations) is being tracked.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Bank
x-enumeration-literals.description: The bank that maintains accounts, monitors transactions, and tracks the overall financial status of the customer.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Account Officer
x-enumeration-literals.description: The person responsible for overseeing the customers accounts and providing updates on their financial status.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Regulatory Authority
x-enumeration-literals.description: Government or official bodies that require reporting or oversight of financial positions to ensure compliance and financial stability.
